mapper.sql: rv.review_id, rv.user_id, rv.store_id, rv.user_coupon_id, rv.rating, rv.content, rv.status, rv.created_at, rv.updated_at, u.nickname, u.login_id, s.store_name, c.coupon_name
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tb_review rv LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON rv.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON rv.store_id = s.store_id LEFT JOIN tb_user_coupon uc ON rv.user_coupon_id = uc.user_coupon_id LEFT JOIN tb_coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY rv.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_review rv LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON rv.user_id = u.user_id WHERE 1=1

SELECT FROM tb_review rv LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON rv.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON rv.store_id = s.store_id LEFT JOIN tb_user_coupon uc ON rv.user_coupon_id = uc.user_coupon_id LEFT JOIN tb_coupon c ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id WHERE rv.review_id = #{reviewId} AND rv.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_review SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT review_image_id, review_id, image_type, sort_order, created_at FROM tb_review_image WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order, review_image_id
SELECT review_image_id, review_id, image, image_type FROM tb_review_image WHERE review_image_id = #{reviewImageId} AND is_deleted = 0
